data.body: PLAN — Executing epic bbf1 (5-story linear chain S1→S2→S3→S4→S5). Landing method: rebar/Gerrit default (push to refs/for/main, stacked relation chain, LLM-Review+1 & Verified+1 gate each change, submit top to land). Worktree: impl-bbf1-vendor-seam at origin/main 89aebf493. Gates ON: plan-review claim gate + completion-verifier close gate. Verify: make lint && make typecheck && make test. Stories: S1 ef33 (ADR docs-only leaf), S2 ce4d (Backend Protocols+RemoteRef+contract suite+JiraBackend), S3 94f9 (config+registry+select_backend), S4 6673 (route 12 core sites + relocate inlined logic), S5 dfb9 (physically move 8 vendor modules).
